headline: Is lululemon athletica inc. (LULU) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is LULU a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on lululemon athletica inc. on The Wealth Dynasty Report’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on LULU. lululemon athletica inc.’s share was trading at $141.66 as of April 23rd. LULU’s trailing and forward P/E were 10.68 and 11.31 respectively according […]
